analysis_metadata.topic: China's Indo-Pacific Posturing vs US Middle East Preoccupation

key_findings.china_action: Joint Sword-2024A & Second Thomas Shoal violence
key_findings.pattern: Testing red lines during carrier group diversion

key_findings.china_action: Justice Mission 2025 blockade & PLAN involvement in SCS
key_findings.pattern: Normalization of PLAN presence in gray-zone encounters
Exploiting regional defense vacuum and diplomatic leverage

strategic_mechanisms: Cabbage Strategy: Layered coercion using fishing fleets, CCG, and PLAN.
Cost Asymmetry: Forcing U.S. to spend high-value interceptors in ME while China uses low-cost gray-zone tactics.
Normalized Escalation: Using global distractions to establish a new status quo without triggering a major war.
